example_reviews: The app helps users map mood, emotions, and daily patterns over time.
Users value mood tracking when the questions feel manageable and insightful.
groups.notes: Kept the automated theme, but narrowed the group to reviews clearly focused on mood tracking, reflection, and emotional pattern recognition.

groups.theme: Mental health support and stress management
example_reviews: Users rely on the app for help dealing with stress, anxiety, and difficult periods.
The app is valued when it supports emotional coping without overwhelming the user.
groups.notes: Kept the automated group and retained only reviews clearly centered on stress, emotional support, or coping.

example_reviews: Users appreciate informative content, insight, and mental health explanations in the app.
The app is useful when insights and educational material feel relevant and understandable.
groups.notes: Revised the automated group by removing reviews that were mainly about paywalls and keeping reviews focused on informative content and insight.

example_reviews: Users are frustrated when important functionality is hidden behind a paywall.
The app loses value for some users when free access feels too limited or subscription handling feels unfair.
groups.notes: Merged clearly paywall related reviews into this group, including some that were previously misclassified under insights.

example_reviews: Users are concerned about sensitive mental health data being shared with third parties.
Trust depends on clear privacy handling and confidence in how user data is collected or used.
groups.notes: Refined the automated privacy group by keeping reviews centered on privacy, data handling, and user trust, and excluding reviews that were mainly about subscription or reliability problems.
